description: Data provenance mismatch between figures and tables is now WORSE than prior iterations. Table 2 reports AdamW CIFAR-10 constant = 90.13 +/- 0.31 (from iter_003 raw data: seeds 90.48, 90.03, 89.89). Figure 3(a) shows constant at ~89.80 (from iter_006 raw data: seeds 89.72, 90.15, 89.54). The 0.33pp shift between identical configurations in different iterations EXCEEDS the paper's headline 0.25pp spread.
suggestion: Choose ONE data source. Rerun all 7 methods with iter_006 instrumented codebase (21 runs, ~6 GPU-hours) or regenerate Figure 3(a) using iter_003 data with the 7 methods in Table 2.

description: Figure 4 (BEM scatter plot) plots half_lambda at BEM approximately 0.0. Table 6 correctly reports BEM = 0.500. Direct visual contradiction flagged in iter_007 and iter_008, still unfixed.
suggestion: Regenerate Figure 4 from the same data that produced Table 6. 20-minute fix.

description: Three contradictory spread numbers for AdamW + ResNet-20 + CIFAR-10: Figure 3(a) says 0.49pp; Section 5.1 says 0.25pp; Table 2 data gives 0.25pp.
suggestion: After fixing data provenance, recompute spread from authoritative Table 2 and update Figure 3 annotation.

description: No ImageNet experiments despite project constraints and claims about 'modern deep learning.'
suggestion: Diagnose previous failures, then run ImageNet-100 with 3 methods x 3 seeds x ResNet-50.

description: PMP-WD ghost method: appears in Figure 3(a) but absent from all tables and text. Figure 3 panels use different method sets, invalidating cross-architecture comparison.
suggestion: Remove PMP-WD from all figures and regenerate with the 7 methods listed in the paper.

description: Section 5.7 cumulative alignment analysis shows rho=-0.379, p=0.121 (not significant). N=18 is underpowered. Adds page count without evidence.
suggestion: Frame as exploratory negative result or remove entirely.

description: Statistical power insufficient: N=3, TOST confirms equivalence in only 6/12 comparisons at delta=1.0%.
suggestion: Add 2 seeds for 4 key comparisons (8 runs, ~2 GPU-hours).

description: NoBN ablation data from iter_005 exists but unused. Directly tests Section 6.2 BN mechanism hypothesis at zero compute cost.
suggestion: Integrate NoBN data into the paper.

description: CSI has arbitrary weights (0.4, 0.3, 0.3), does not predict accuracy, listed as a contribution.
suggestion: Demote from contribution to exploratory diagnostic.

description: Abstract implies full factorial design (7x2x2x2x3=168) but actual design is non-factorial (84+21=105).
suggestion: Rewrite abstract to explicitly describe the non-factorial experimental design.

description: Figure numbering inconsistent with order of first reference. Internal filenames do not match paper numbering.
Proposition 1 (composition closure) is trivially obvious. Vestigial filename theorem2_validation.png.
suggestion: Downgrade to inline remark. Rename file.
